title: 401 Funds Management – Expenditures
summary: This policy establishes required internal controls, authorization procedures, and documentation standards for all disbursements, purchasing cycles, petty cash, credit cards, debit cards, gift cards, and SCRIP programs at diocesan entities.
notes: 1. The document header shows 'Rev 12/16' which is interpreted as December 2016; this is used as both the effective date and last review date, but no explicit calendar date is stated. 2. A prior revision was effective August 2014, per the Summary of Revisions section. 3. No next review date or review cadence is specified; next_review_date is left null. 4. The policy references a record retention schedule for disbursement documentation but does not state a specific retention period in years; retention_period_years is left null. 5. The document already carries its own section numbering (401, 401.1–401.10); the suggested chapter-section address 4.1.0 maps directly to that numbering convention. 6. The policy references multiple appendices (6, 10.14–10.25, 14) that are not included in this document; a human reviewer should confirm those appendices are current and attached. 7. The debit card section (401.7) prohibits use except with explicit CFO authorization, which is a notable control point that should be flagged for operational awareness. 8. The Florida sales tax exemption language is jurisdiction-specific; applicability should be confirmed if this policy is used outside Florida. 9. Section 401.10 notes that independent contractors and payroll were shifted to a new Section 501; a human reviewer should confirm Section 501 exists and is current.
